business_question: Which product categories generate the highest revenue per SKU?
business_context: Merchandising teams want to evaluate assortment efficiency. Categories generating high revenue with fewer SKUs often indicate a strong product mix, while categories with many SKUs but low revenue may require assortment optimization.
sql_answer:
WITH category_metrics AS (
SELECT
p.CATEGORY,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
COUNT(DISTINCT p.PRODUCT_KEY) AS SKU_COUNT
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.CATEGORY
)

SELECT
CATEGORY,
TOTAL_REVENUE,
SKU_COUNT,
ROUND(
TOTAL_REVENUE /
NULLIF(SKU_COUNT,0),
2
) AS REVENUE_PER_SKU
FROM category_metrics
ORDER BY REVENUE_PER_SKU DESC;
